steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, under the "Source Volume" selection section, choose the volume for segmentation.

sub_operations.question: Choose the source volume for segmentation

choice_info.question: Choose the source volume for segmentation

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, create a new segmentation named "Cranial_Segmentation".

sub_operations.description: Create a new segmentation node named Cranial_Segmentation

operation_descriptions: Create a new segmentation node named Cranial_Segmentation

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Add" button and rename the segment to "Cranial_Segment".

sub_operations.description: Add a segment named Cranial_Segment to the segmentation

operation_descriptions: Add a segment named Cranial_Segment to the segmentation

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Threshold" button.

sub_operations.description: Open the Threshold effect in Segment Editor

operation_descriptions: Open the Threshold effect in Segment Editor

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, adjust the threshold range bar to set the range value for segmentation.

sub_operations.description: Adjust the threshold range for segmentation
sub_operations.question: Adjust the threshold range for segmentation

choice_info.question: Adjust the threshold range for segmentation

ui_guidance.title: Set threshold range
ui_guidance.instruction: Adjust the range to isolate the skull.

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Apply" button.
In the "Skull Mask" section, choose the segment node.

sub_operations.description: Choose the skull mask segment node
sub_operations.question: Choose the skull mask segment node

choice_info.question: Choose the skull mask segment node

ui_guidance.title: Select skull mask segment
ui_guidance.instruction: Pick the segment you just created.

sub_operations.description: Load the selected skull mask via Load Skull Mask button
Add an ROI node using Add ROI button

steps.description: Manually adjust the boundaries of the ROI to retain the skull portion.

sub_operations.description: Manually adjust the ROI boundaries to retain the skull portion

ui_guidance.title: Adjust ROI boundaries
ui_guidance.instruction: Drag handles to enclose the skull portion.

sub_operations.description: Crop skull mask to the ROI using Crop to ROI button

steps.description: Manually adjust the 3D view to get the best angle for placing the cutting curve.

sub_operations.description: Manually adjust the 3D view for best angle for cutting curve placement

ui_guidance.title: Adjust 3D view
ui_guidance.instruction: Rotate and zoom to get a good angle for placing the cutting curve.

steps.description: In the "Markups" module, click "Closed Curve" to create a closed curve node.

sub_operations.description: Create a new closed curve markups node via Markups module

operation_descriptions: Create a new closed curve markups node via Markups module

steps.description: Manually draw the curve on the skull model to enclose the fractured skull portion.

sub_operations.description: Draw closed curve on the skull model to enclose the fractured portion

ui_guidance.title: Draw cutting curve
ui_guidance.instruction: Place points along the skull boundary to enclose the defect.

steps.description: In the "Curve selection" section, choose the curve node.

sub_operations.description: Choose the curve node from Curve selection section
sub_operations.question: Choose the curve node

ui_guidance.title: Select the curve
ui_guidance.instruction: Pick the curve you just drew.

sub_operations.description: Cut defect from skull using the curve via Cut Defect button
Hide the curve node by making it invisible

operation_descriptions: Hide the curve node by making it invisible

sub_operations.description: Generate implant model from defect via Generate Implant button
